revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

Removing from [[Category:Qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Refreshing categories falsely categorized as uncategorized]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Supercategory 2]]" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
revision.text:
[[Category:redirect categories]]redirect [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:redirect categories]]
[[en:Category:1867 in Japan]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:1867年の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في 1867]] [[azb:Category:۱۸۶۷-جی ایلده ژاپون]] [[commons:Category:1867 in Japan]] [[es:Category:Japón en 1867]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در ۱۸۶۷ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:1867 au Japon]] [[hy:Category:1867 Ճապոնիայում]] [[ko:Category:1867년 일본]] [[ru:Category:1867 год в Японии]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں 1867ء]] [[zh:Category:1867年日本]]

revision.text:
